titleStmt.title: SII 23.435: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 435. (A.R. No. 435 of 1907.) Śiṉṉamaṉūr, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Rājasiṁhēśvara temple—on the south wall of the shrine of goddess Śivakāmi Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara I: year 3: 1270-71 A.D.

summary.p: This is a damaged and disconnected record of four different pieces, which seems to register an endowment of 5 mā of land to provide for the expenses of a service called the Tirunīlakantan-śandi in the hrine of Tirukkāmakkōṭṭam Periyanāchchiyār in the temple. Two persons are mentioned in connection with this gift evidently as donors viz. Tirukkaivēlammaidēvaṉ and his brother Tirunelvēli-uḍaiyāṉ of [Śīval]lavaṉ-paḍaivīḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamum koṇṭaruḷiya śrī kulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu3vatu Aḷanāṭṭu brammatecam
Arikecarinallūr Uṭaiyār Irācasiṅṅesuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil śrīuruttira śrīmāhe lavaṉ paṭaiviṭṭut tirukkaivel A
mmait tevaṉukkum Ivaṉ tampi tirunelveli Uṭaiyāṉukkum ṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉār tirukkā
makkoṭṭam periya nācciyāṟku tirunilakaṇṭaṉ cantikku ñcu māvukku Ivarkaḷ nilamāy Ivarka

—ṉa nilamāvatu kārāṇmai kāṇi tāyaṉ colai
pakkalil Āya ppaṟṟil nilam Añcumā m pirāma
ṇar paṟṟuka vāykkālukku meṟ lukkum
vaṭakkum melellai Aḻaka mpaṟṟu �luk ṭalukkum
teṟkum In Añcu tanellu
nūṟṟaimpatiṉ kala minnellu nūṟṟaimpatinkalattu coṟu rakkālāle

Aḷantu taruvārāka Innellu tirunilakaṇṭaṉ cantikku Aḷakkum Arici patak ḻiyum nācciyār Amutuceytu tecāntirikkuk kuṭu
kkum tirumuṉṉoṭukku nālukku Arici nāṉāḻi kuṭuppatākavum Ivai taricu kiṭakkil I ṟu Iṭṭaḷappatākavum Innilattil kkuṟuvai

—ku Ivoṭṭi lu mukkālaḷappatākavum maṟṟuc ceyyum paṭi vilai Oṟṟi ciritaṉam
ḷiyiṟ piṟintu cantirātittavaṟ celva ceytuc cakkara ḻuttu
ppiramātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku maṭattil māheśvararum nilaṅkalanta vāṟṟārum Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.435 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
